chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Revision Application No.121 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing / Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.3891 of 2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026 Syed Salim Ahmed, Advocate for the applicant. None present for the respondents. ------------------------------------ Counsel for the applicant no longer wishes to press this lis in the light of developments following the order dated 07.05.2025 before the Federal Ombudsman. Accordingly, this revision application is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
